testcase.name: test_07_patch_pool_picker_rule_update_allowed_pools
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pool_picker_rules.py:164: in test_07_patch_pool_picker_rule_update_allowed_pools assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to update rule: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to update rule: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_14_user_create_includes_can_pick_field
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pool_picker_rules.py:350: in test_14_user_create_includes_can_pick_field assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create user: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create user: {"detail":"Subscription plan is required for Partners"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_15_user_update_can_pick_field
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pool_picker_rules.py:381: in test_15_user_update_can_pick_field assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_17_changing_config_affects_pool_eligibility
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pool_picker_rules.py:457: in test_17_changing_config_affects_pool_eligibility assert update_response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
